documentation:
# thousandeyes-sdk-core

This package provides core functionality for interacting with the ThousandEyes API and should be installed before using any of the published SDKs.

documentation: Returns a string representation of a path

classes.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.exceptions.OpenApiException
documentation: The base exception class for all OpenAPIExceptions

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.exceptions.ApiTypeError.__init__
documentation:
Raises an exception for TypeErrors

Args:
    msg (str): the exception message

Keyword Args:
    path_to_item (list): a list of keys an indices to get to the
                         current_item
                         None if unset
    valid_classes (tuple): the primitive classes that current item
                           should be an instance of
                           None if unset
    key_type (bool): False if our value is a value in a dict
                     True if it is a key in a dict
                     False if our item is an item in a list
                     None if unset

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.exceptions.ApiValueError.__init__
documentation:
Args:
    msg (str): the exception message

Keyword Args:
    path_to_item (list) the path to the exception in the
        received_data dict. None if unset

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.exceptions.ApiAttributeError.__init__
documentation:
Raised when an attribute reference or assignment fails.

Args:
    msg (str): the exception message

Keyword Args:
    path_to_item (None/list) the path to the exception in the
        received_data dict

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.exceptions.ApiKeyError.__init__
documentation:
Args:
    msg (str): the exception message

Keyword Args:
    path_to_item (None/list) the path to the exception in the
        received_data dict

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.rest.RESTClientObject.request
documentation:
Perform requests.

```
param method

http request method

param url

http request url

param headers

http request headers

param body

request json body, for 

param post_params

request post parameters,

and 

param _request_timeout

timeout setting for this request. If one
number provided, it will be total request
timeout. It can also be a pair (tuple) of
(connection, read) timeouts.
```

documentation: Constructor

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.configuration.Configuration.set_default
documentation:
Set default instance of configuration.

It stores default configuration, which can be
returned by get_default_copy method.

```
param default

object of Configuration
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.configuration.Configuration.get_default
documentation:
Return the default configuration.

This method returns newly created, based on default constructor,
object of Configuration class or returns a copy of default
configuration.

```
return

The configuration object.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.configuration.Configuration.logger_file
documentation:
The logger file.

If the logger_file is None, then add stream handler and remove file
handler. Otherwise, add file handler and remove stream handler.

```
param value

The logger_file path.

type

str
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.configuration.Configuration.logger_file
documentation:
The logger file.

If the logger_file is None, then add stream handler and remove file
handler. Otherwise, add file handler and remove stream handler.

```
param value

The logger_file path.

type

str
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.configuration.Configuration.logger_format
documentation:
The logger format.

The logger_formatter will be updated when sets logger_format.

```
param value

The format string.

type

str
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.configuration.Configuration.logger_format
documentation:
The logger format.

The logger_formatter will be updated when sets logger_format.

```
param value

The format string.

type

str
```

classes.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.user_agent
documentation: User agent for this API client

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.get_default
documentation:
Return new instance of ApiClient.

This method returns newly created, based on default constructor,
object of ApiClient class or returns a copy of default
ApiClient.

```
return

The ApiClient object.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.set_default
documentation:
Set default instance of ApiClient.

It stores default ApiClient.

```
param default

object of ApiClient.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.param_serialize
documentation:
Builds the HTTP request params needed by the request.
\:param method: Method to call.
\:param resource_path: Path to method endpoint.
\:param path_params: Path parameters in the url.
\:param query_params: Query parameters in the url.
\:param header_params: Header parameters to be

> placed in the request header.

```
param body

Request body.

param post_params dict

Request post form parameters,
for , .

param auth_settings list

Auth Settings names for the request.

param files dict

key -> filename, value -> filepath,
for .

param collection_formats

dict of collection formats for path, query,
header, and post parameters.

param _request_auth

set to override the auth_settings for an a single
request; this effectively ignores the authentication
in the spec for a single request.

return

tuple of form (path, http_method, query_params, header_params,
body, post_params, files)
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.call_api
documentation:
Makes the HTTP request (synchronous)
\:param method: Method to call.
\:param url: Path to method endpoint.
\:param header_params: Header parameters to be

> placed in the request header.

```
param body

Request body.

param post_params dict

Request post form parameters,
for , .

param _request_timeout

timeout setting for this request.

return

RESTResponse
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.response_deserialize
documentation:
Deserializes response into an object.
\:param response_data: RESTResponse object to be deserialized.
\:param response_types_map: dict of response types.
\:return: ApiResponse

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.sanitize_for_serialization
documentation:
Builds a JSON POST object.

If obj is None, return None.
If obj is SecretStr, return obj.get_secret_value()
If obj is str, int, long, float, bool, return directly.
If obj is datetime.datetime, datetime.date

> convert to string in iso8601 format.

If obj is list, sanitize each element in the list.
If obj is dict, return the dict.
If obj is OpenAPI model, return the properties dict.

```
param obj

The data to serialize.

return

The serialized form of data.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.deserialize
documentation:
Deserializes response into an object.

```
param response

RESTResponse object to be deserialized.

param response_type

class literal for
deserialized object, or string of class name.

param models

Object containing the model classes

return

deserialized object.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.__deserialize
documentation:
Deserializes dict, list, str into an object.

```
param data

dict, list or str.

param klass

class literal, or string of class name.

param models

object containing the model classes to deserialise into

return

object.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.parameters_to_tuples
documentation:
Get parameters as list of tuples, formatting collections.

```
param params

Parameters as dict or list of two-tuples

param dict collection_formats

Parameter collection formats

return

Parameters as list of tuples, collections formatted
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.parameters_to_url_query
documentation:
Get parameters as list of tuples, formatting collections.

```
param params

Parameters as dict or list of two-tuples

param dict collection_formats

Parameter collection formats

return

URL query string (e.g. a=Hello%20World&b=123)
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.files_parameters
documentation:
Builds form parameters.

```
param files

File parameters.

return

Form parameters with files.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.select_header_accept
documentation:
Returns `Accept` based on an array of accepts provided.

```
param accepts

List of headers.

return

Accept (e.g. application/json).
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.select_header_content_type
documentation:
Returns `Content-Type` based on an array of content_types provided.

```
param content_types

List of content-types.

return

Content-Type (e.g. application/json).
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.update_params_for_auth
documentation:
Updates header and query params based on authentication setting.

```
param headers

Header parameters dict to be updated.

param queries

Query parameters tuple list to be updated.

param auth_settings

Authentication setting identifiers list.

resource_path

A string representation of the HTTP request resource path.

method

A string representation of the HTTP request method.

body

A object representing the body of the HTTP request.
```

The object type is the return value of sanitize_for_serialization().
\:param request_auth: if set, the provided settings will

> override the token in the configuration.

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient._apply_auth_params
documentation:
Updates the request parameters based on a single auth_setting

```
param headers

Header parameters dict to be updated.

param queries

Query parameters tuple list to be updated.

resource_path

A string representation of the HTTP request resource path.

method

A string representation of the HTTP request method.

body

A object representing the body of the HTTP request.
```

The object type is the return value of sanitize_for_serialization().
\:param auth_setting: auth settings for the endpoint

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.__deserialize_primitive
documentation:
Deserializes string to primitive type.

```
param data

str.

param klass

class literal.

return

int, long, float, str, bool.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.__deserialize_object
documentation:
Return an original value.

```
return

object.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.__deserialize_date
documentation:
Deserializes string to date.

```
param string

str.

return

date.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.__deserialize_datetime
documentation:
Deserializes string to datetime.

The string should be in iso8601 datetime format.

```
param string

str.

return

datetime.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.__deserialize_enum
documentation:
Deserializes primitive type to enum.

```
param data

primitive type.

param klass

class literal.

return

enum value.
```

methods.name: thousandeyes_sdk.core.api_client.ApiClient.__deserialize_model
documentation:
Deserializes list or dict to model.

```
param data

dict, list.

param klass

class literal.

return

model object.
```

Generic API client for OpenAPI client library builds.

OpenAPI generic API client. This client handles the client-
server communication, and is invariant across implementations. Specifics of
the methods and models for each application are generated from the OpenAPI
templates.

```
param configuration

.Configuration object for this client

param header_name

a header to pass when making calls to the API.

param header_value

a header value to pass when making calls to
the API.
```
